_meta.note: Frozen regression baseline. Every value was captured ONCE from a real run of the public adaptive API via tests/golden_cases.py and is never edited by hand. To re-freeze after an intended engine change, run `python -m pytest tests/test_golden.py --update-golden`. The solver is bit-identical run to run (see test_determinism.py); the per-entry rtol/atol only absorb cross-platform LAPACK/numpy float variation, NOT run-to-run noise. `paper` points at the artifact each number backs; where the live number disagrees with the paper text, that gap is recorded in REPRODUCIBILITY.md as a finding, not patched here.
_meta.tolerance_rule: fail if abs(live - value) > atol + rtol * abs(value)

rlc_idp_vs_td_580krad_nrmse.paper: Sec. accuracy claim: IDP single-shift matches full TD on the series-RLC benchmark.
rlc_idp_vs_td_580krad_nrmse.source: compare V(out): mode=idp vs mode=td, series RLC driven at 580 krad/s (resonance).

rlc_idp_vs_td_580krad_r2.paper: Same accuracy claim; R^2 reported as ~1.0.
rlc_idp_vs_td_580krad_r2.source: compare V(out): mode=idp vs mode=td at 580 krad/s.

rlc_idp_vs_td_650krad_nrmse.paper: Off-resonance accuracy: IDP stays exact away from the tuned point.
rlc_idp_vs_td_650krad_nrmse.source: compare V(out): mode=idp vs mode=td at 650 krad/s (off resonance).

rlc_idp_vs_td_650krad_r2.source: compare V(out): mode=idp vs mode=td at 650 krad/s.

rlc_idp_vs_td_sweep_50p_nrmse.paper: Table 3 per-duration accuracy: IDP-vs-TD NRMSE at a 50-cycle window.
rlc_idp_vs_td_sweep_50p_nrmse.source: reproduce.duration_sweep([50]), V(out) IDP vs TD NRMSE.

rlc_idp_vs_td_sweep_200p_nrmse.paper: Table 3 per-duration accuracy: NRMSE grows with the simulated window (finding, see PAPER_CODE_MISMATCHES.md).
rlc_idp_vs_td_sweep_200p_nrmse.source: reproduce.duration_sweep([200]), V(out) IDP vs TD NRMSE.

rectifier_conduction_halfwave_deg.paper: Fig. 5 / Table 4 rectifier: half-wave (no smoothing cap) conduction angle ~175 deg.
rectifier_conduction_halfwave_deg.source: HB solve, summary.conduction_angle_deg, half-wave rectifier C=0.

rectifier_conduction_C10u_deg.paper: Rectifier conduction shrinks with smoothing cap; C=10uF ~102 deg.

rectifier_nrmse_vs_ltspice_autoK.paper: Table 4 accuracy of HB rectifier vs LTspice reference waveform.
rectifier_nrmse_vs_ltspice_autoK.source: validate V(out) vs bundled examples/rectifier_halfwave.raw, auto harmonic count.

rectifier_nrmse_vs_ltspice_K40.paper: Table 4 accuracy improves as harmonic count K rises (K=40).

rlc_nrmse_vs_ngspice.paper: Validation-vs-ngspice tightens far below the paper's vs-LTspice band (see REPRODUCIBILITY.md).
rlc_nrmse_vs_ngspice.source: validate series RLC (580 krad/s) against auto ngspice run, worst node NRMSE.

coupled_k0.9_nrmse_vs_ngspice.paper: Tightly-coupled (k=0.9) magnetics; paper Table 2 reports ~0.54% vs LTspice.
coupled_k0.9_nrmse_vs_ngspice.source: validate coupled-inductor pair k=0.9 against auto ngspice run, worst node NRMSE.

wpt_k0.2_nrmse_vs_ngspice.paper: Series-series WPT link k=0.2; paper Table 2 reports ~2.87% vs LTspice.
wpt_k0.2_nrmse_vs_ngspice.source: validate WPT link (general SVD reduction path) against auto ngspice run, worst node NRMSE.
